name: Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Reconciling vendor invoices with purchase orders
features: Email weekly reports to procurement managers
Provide a dashboard for invoice tracking
Allow manual entry of invoices for reconciliation
